*more laughter*
*Staaaaaaaaph*
How does she make that teapot float?

item.title: 30 + 20 Memes
item.dc:creator: Aloysiust

item.title: The Christmas Cat
item.description:
This is my fiance, Kat. Every year she researches old age homes for elderly folk whose family stopped visiting. Then she asks them what would they like for Christmas, and delivers it to them!
This year we made it to three different homes, and put a lot of smiles on old folks' faces. :)
Some can't remember making a wish, but are very happy for the visitation.
Neglect often leades to isolation, and so many old people will not have anyone visit them for Christmas, or bring presents. This is where Kat comes in!
I'm incredibly proud of her. It's heartbreaking to see how many elderly peeps are forgotten, left behind after leading full lives. She's already looking forward to next year, reaching out to more old age homes. So many elderly people could use a spark of joy in their lives. Fingers crossed the Christmas Cat (Weihnachtskatz in German) will continue to grow each year! TLDR: My girlfriend started a charity out of her own pocket to bring Christmas presents to neglected residents in old age homes.
item.dc:creator: badmanjam

item.dc:creator: esberat

item.title: Mr. Figaro’s first Christmas. Merry Christmas Imgur!
item.description:
Figaro got to spend Christmas at grandma and grandpa’s house and loved every second…except backpack.
*heavy breathing*
I forgot how hard it is to take pictures with cats. Especially chunky 14lb beef loafs. Sylvester was way easier and fatter. https://imgur.com/gallery/yH5KJgv
I got a banana for Christmas woo!
I also finally made the chocolate that I made from the cacao pods last Christmas. Presents for family and friends.
He got a squeaky mouse for Christmas and is feral for it.
Merry Christmas again! Hope your new year is even better - Love Fig & Moni
item.dc:creator: ItsMoni

item.title: Kyah!
item.dc:creator: Lassannn

item.title: Hey look over there, the stock market is hitting record highs
item.description:
I'm sure the incoming administration will take all this very seriously and take steps to staff the responsible govt agencies accordingly /s It's 70 degrees and raining in Texas. Thisisfine.gif https://www.sciencealert.com/even-nasa-cant-explain-the-alarming-surge-in-global-heat-were-seeing Most Viral Edit: Thanks for the upvotes y'all! If we are talking about viable solutions, I propose we hear out Crab People. We clearly dropped the ball as custodians of this planet, maybe Crab People can do better. Worst case scenario, we taste like crab and talk like people. I see no downsides to this arrangement.
Dog tax: Duke and Charlie. Duke is a climate change denier, Charlie can't read so he has no opinions, he's just happy to be involved.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: Kitty’s goalkeeper…
item.dc:creator: tractorist

item.title: Sorry, not sorry
item.description: I know a lot of you missed it but the secret Santa posts literally inundated imgur for weeks. From those people who were super happy with their gifts, or those who got stiffed and received nothing, it was a lot and personally I didn't miss it a bit this year. On that note, Merry Christmas and go team pinecone. Edit: I never mentioned all the selfies but am getting a lot of comments about them so just throwing this out there, I think they kinda suck too but at least it's only like 2 days of it instead of weeks.
item.dc:creator: PrincessPuffyPants
